## Summary

- Briefly describe the change.

## Linked Tasks Or Issues

- Link related tasks or issues.

## Checks Run

- [ ] `dotnet test .\src\SectorForge.slnx`
- [ ] `dotnet format .\src\SectorForge.slnx --verify-no-changes`
- [ ] `npx --yes pnpm@latest --dir .\src\SectorForge.Web lint`
- [ ] `npx --yes pnpm@latest --dir .\src\SectorForge.Web build`

## Screenshots Or Clips

Add screenshots or short clips for UI changes. Write `N/A` when the change has no UI impact.

## Notes

Call out assumptions, follow-up work, or reviewer context.
